## Repo to add

Format: `owner/repo` (e.g. `vercel/swr`)

**Tip:** Search [existing issues](https://github.com/Ali-Karaki/issue-scout.dev/issues?q=is%3Aissue+Request) before submitting to avoid duplicates. You can upvote with a thumbs-up reaction.
